title: Your first agent configuration with MCP and Looker
summary: Google Cloud Tech tutorial on building AI-powered agents using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) with Looker integration. Covers Model Context Protocol (MCP), MCP Toolbox for Databases, tools.yaml configuration, Looker API credential setup, and Python environment configuration for creating data-grounded agents.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through configuring a first AI agent with the Agent Development Kit (ADK) connected to Looker through the Model Context Protocol (MCP). It covers the MCP Toolbox for Databases, tools.yaml configuration, Looker API credential setup, and Python environment configuration. The goal is data-grounded agents: ones whose responses are anchored in Looker data rather than ungrounded model output. Concepts include grounding and workflow automation alongside the ADK and MCP setup steps.
